mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_property_interaction ( user_id, property_id, view_count, total_dwell_time_millis, max_scroll_depth_percent, recommendation_detail_click_count, deal_history_click_count ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{propertyId}, 1, #{dwellTimeMillis}, #{maxScrollDepthPercent}, CASE WHEN #{recommendationDetailClicked} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{dealHistoryClicked} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE view_count = view_count + 1, total_dwell_time_millis = total_dwell_time_millis + VALUES(total_dwell_time_millis), max_scroll_depth_percent = GREATEST( max_scroll_depth_percent, VALUES(max_scroll_depth_percent) ), recommendation_detail_click_count = recommendation_detail_click_count + VALUES(recommendation_detail_click_count), deal_history_click_count = deal_history_click_count + VALUES(deal_history_click_count), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
